meaning: adj.向上的,(声调)声高的adv.以上
examples: She started once again on the steep upward climb.
Unemployment will continue upward for much of this year.
The chopper shot upward in a manoeuvre matched by the other pilot.
Their continued exponential climb upward relies on physics and human ingenuity, less on capital.
Already Dell is planning to invade the larger Level 3 switch market and go upward from there.
